title: Beats11playz VC pack
description: Hello guys this is a texturepack for Voice chat.It has the same texture for buttons and GUI as the Beats11playz Resourcepack.
body:
#   📖What does this add?
- This texturepack adds dark buttons and a clear backround for the voice chat settings.![Dark settings]![Dark settings](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/84b13752c0704e2ee468b1908ea2057ce38d6836.png) 
#     📖 Usage
- This pack works with the mod:[https://modrinth.com/plugin/simple-voice-chat] (https://modrinth.com/plugin/simple-voice-chat)

#     ❓ Why is the pack not working?
- If this pack is not working try to click on the arrows to put it at the top of the Resourcepack setings.![Put it at the top](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ea859154ec39efe5870d3993a6d504b2d9703c4a.png)

**❗This is still not working...**
- Join my discord server,open a ticket and a mod or me will try to help you.
Discord →[[https://discord.gg/p2R7C59H4u](https://discord.gg/p2R7C59H4u)](https://discord.gg/9NrzSShHpg)
